## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserDropOn] if the drop occurs on an item, otherwise [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserDropBefore].

## Discussion

The returned value is valid when a drop occurred and until next drop.

For example, given a browser with `N` cells , a cell of `N-1` and operation of [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserDropOn] would specify a drop on the last cell.  To specify a drop after the last cell, one would use an index of `N` and [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserDropBefore] for the operation.

# dropOperation()

**Instance Method**

Returns the current drop operation.

## Declaration

```swift
func dropOperation() -> IKImageBrowserDropOperation
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserDropOn] if the drop occurs on an item, otherwise [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserDropBefore].

## Discussion

The returned value is valid when a drop occurred and until next drop.

For example, given a browser with `N` cells , a cell of `N-1` and operation of [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserDropOn] would specify a drop on the last cell.  To specify a drop after the last cell, one would use an index of `N` and [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserDropBefore] for the operation.

## Supporting Drag and Drop

- **setDraggingDestinationDelegate(_:)**: Sets the dragging destination delegate of the receiver.
- **draggingDestinationDelegate()**: Returns the dragging destination delegate of the receiver.
- **setDrop(_:dropOperation:)**: Allows the class to retarget the drop action.
- **indexAtLocationOfDroppedItem()**: Returns the index of the cell where the drop operation occurred.
- **setAllowsDroppingOnItems(_:)**: Specifies whether the user can drop on items.
- **allowsDroppingOnItems()**: Returns whether the user can drop on items.
